/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/iBMSCQt.dir/iBMSCQt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iBMSCQt.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iBMSCQt.dir/src/ui/dialogs/color_picker_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iBMSCQt.dir/src/ui/dialogs/import_sm_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iBMSCQt.dir/src/ui/dialogs/compare_method_dialog.cpp.o /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/lib/QtXml.framework/Versions/A/QtXml
